data.description: You gain the ability to enter a tree and move from inside it to another of the same kind within 500 feet. Both trees must be living and at least the same size as you use your movement to enter the tree. You must know the location of at least five other trees of the same kind within 500 feet as part of entering the tree, either passing into one of those trees or stepping out of the tree you're in. You appear in a spot within 5 feet of your destination using your choice of movement. If you have no remaining movement, you appear within 5 feet of the tree entered. You can use this transportation ability once per round for duration. You must end each turn outside a tree.
